patch.value:
## Context

File: src/cli/commands/health.ts line 705 — warning `extension_update_health_partial_coverage:skipped_unmanaged:<count>` is emitted when extensions are unmanaged.

File: src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts — no entry for `extension_update_health_partial_coverage`. The comment at line 40 says extension findings are excluded, but partial-coverage is not a per-extension triage result — it is a system-wide finding about adoption gaps, making it a legitimate registry candidate.

## Acceptance criteria

- Add `extension_update_health_partial_coverage` code to REMEDIATION_REGISTRY with command: 'pm extension --adopt-all --project' and a summary explaining the adoption flow.
- The existing mutually-exclusive-codes test in remediation-registry.spec.ts still passes.
- pm health --json on a repo with unmanaged extensions shows remediation_map for this code.

## Evidence

src/cli/commands/health.ts:705 — warning code emitted.
src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts:43 — registry list; no extension_update_health_partial_coverage entry.
Add remediation registry entry for extension_update_health_partial_coverage warning

The remediation registry (src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts) covers all core pm health / pm validate warning codes but is missing an entry for `extension_update_health_partial_coverage`, which is emitted by the extensions health check when unmanaged extensions are present (health.ts line 705). Agents gating on pm health --json get a warning with no remediation_map entry, so they must hardcode the fix command.
Registry entry present; mutually-exclusive-codes test passes; --json shows remediation_map for the code when unmanaged extensions exist.

- Add `extension_update_health_partial_coverage` code to REMEDIATION_REGISTRY with command: 'pm extension --adopt-all --project' and a summary explaining the adoption flow.
- The existing mutually-exclusive-codes test in remediation-registry.spec.ts still passes.
- pm health --json on a repo with unmanaged extensions shows remediation_map for this code.
